title: Create : CROWNS
description: Generate SU with Nuclear power and turbines
body:
Creating Rotation Operated With Nuclear Science is a Create addon that add a way to create a lot of S.U. by using nuclear power.

 

heat up water and then use the vapor to turn turbines, has simple as that.

 

 

This project is still in developpement and some more content is planned to come in the futur :

- the option to use a more realistic thermal cycle for the players who want realism

- fusion

- compatibility with other mods (ore generation on the moon for space mods, or nuclear engines for Creating Space)

- radiation sickness

__**LINKS:**__
